message:
feat(anthropic): add provenance/taint metadata and fix streaming pipeline

Add provenance object (source, model, integrity, has_tool_calls, taint)
to all Anthropic operation outputs for data lineage tracking. Fix stream
pin lifetime, migrate FcpError::ExternalService to FcpError::External,
and update related field types to CapabilityId.

- content_blocks field added to message output schema
- Test vector manifest expanded from minimal placeholder to full schema
- Integration tests for provenance metadata and stream invoke assembly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 name = "Anthropic Connector"

-description = "Manifest vector for Anthropic connector capability mapping"

     "operational",

 [capabilities]
-required = ["network.dns", "network.egress", "network.tls.sni"]
+required = [
+    "network.dns",
+    "network.egress",
+    "network.tls.sni",

-forbidden = ["system.exec", "network.listen", "storage.state"]
-
-[provides.operations."anthropic.message"]
-description = "Structured Claude message operation"
-capability = "anthropic.message"
-risk_level = "medium"
-safety_tier = "safe"
-requires_approval = "none"
-idempotency = "none"
-input_schema = { type = "object", required = ["messages"] }
-output_schema = { type = "object", required = ["id", "content", "usage"] }

+forbidden = [

 [provides.operations."anthropic.chat"]
-description = "Single-turn Claude chat operation"

 capability = "anthropic.chat"
 risk_level = "medium"
 safety_tier = "safe"
 requires_approval = "none"
 idempotency = "none"
-input_schema = { type = "object", required = ["message"] }

-network_constraints = { host_allow = ["api.anthropic.com"], port_allow = [443], require_sni = true }
+
+[provides.operations."anthropic.chat".rate_limit]
+max = 120
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."anthropic.chat".input_schema]
+required = ["message"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."anthropic.chat".input_schema.properties.max_tokens]
+default = 4096

+type = "integer"

+minLength = 1
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."anthropic.chat".input_schema.properties.model]

+description = "Anthropic model to use"

+    "claude-opus-4-5-20251101",
+    "claude-sonnet-4-20250514",

+    "claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022",

+    "cost_usd",

+
+[provides.operations."anthropic.chat".output_schema.properties.usage.properties.output_tokens]
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."anthropic.chat".output_schema.properties.provenance]

+

+    "anthropic.message",
+    "anthropic.get_usage",
+]
